items.title: New Paper Accepted in JCIM: Nanomaterial-Protein Interactions
items.excerpt: Our collaborative study with experimentalists on nanomaterial and protein interactions has been accepted in the Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling. Congratulations to Yihan Zhou who served as co-first author on this work!

items.title: New Paper Accepted in Nature Biomedical Engineering: Novel Drug Delivery System
items.excerpt: Our recent study on a novel drug delivery system has been accepted in Nature Biomedical Engineering. Congratulations to Yihan Zhou who served as co-author on this work!

items.title: MSc Student Chen Chu Wins Excellent Poster Award at XJTLU/XJTU/Liverpool Joint Symposium
items.excerpt: Chen Chu wins the Excellent Poster Presentation Award for her research on bacterial secretion systems at the joint symposium bringing together students and faculty from XJTLU, Xi'an Jiaotong University, and the University of Liverpool. Congratulations Chen Chu!

items.title: Two SURF Projects Launching This Summer on Agentic Bioinformatics
items.excerpt: CC Lab will host two Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship (SURF) projects focused on agentic AI workflows for bioinformatics - applications open soon.

items.title: Welcome Vivian Xia - Our First PhD Student
items.excerpt: Vivian Xia joins CC Lab as our first PhD student. A proud XJTLU alumna who went on to complete her Master's at Columbia University, she returns to work on representation learning for biomolecules.

items.title: PG Research Scholarship Awarded for New PhD Recruitment
items.excerpt: CC Lab has been awarded a Postgraduate Research Scholarship (PGRS), opening a new funded PhD position in computational biology and drug discovery.

items.title: Industrial Grant Secured from SIP BioBay for Next-Generation Immunotherapy
items.excerpt: CC Lab receives a major grant from a Suzhou Industrial Park (SIP) BioBay industrial partner to advance computational design of next-generation immunotherapies.

items.title: New Paper in Scientific Reports: Neoantigen Vaccine Maturation
items.excerpt: Multi-strategy embedded framework for neoantigen vaccine maturation - integrating computational design with immunogenicity optimization for personalized cancer vaccines.

items.title: New Paper in Briefings in Bioinformatics: FEP-Assisted ML for Vaccine Design
items.excerpt: Free energy perturbation-assisted machine learning strategy for mimotope screening in neoantigen-based vaccine design, combining physics-based and data-driven approaches.

items.title: New Paper in PNAS: Computational Genomics of Parasitoid Wasps
items.excerpt: Genomic signatures associated with the evolutionary loss of egg yolk in parasitoid wasps - a cross-disciplinary computational genomics study published in PNAS.

items.title: Paper Published in Nature: BAM-Mediated Membrane Protein Assembly
items.excerpt: Structural basis of BAM-mediated outer membrane β-barrel protein assembly, revealing the molecular mechanism of a fundamental biological process at atomic resolution.

items.title: CC Lab Established at XJTLU
items.excerpt: Dr. Kevin Chan joins XJTLU as Assistant Professor, establishing CC Lab at the intersection of structural bioinformatics, molecular dynamics, and biological foundation models.
